name: proc_creation_win_gup_suspicious_execution
raw_query: any where process.executable:"*\\GUP.exe" and (not ((process.executable like~ ("*\\Program Files\\Notepad++\\updater\\GUP.exe", "*\\Program Files (x86)\\Notepad++\\updater\\GUP.exe")) or (process.executable:"*\\Users\\*" and (process.executable like~ ("*\\AppData\\Local\\Notepad++\\updater\\GUP.exe", "*\\AppData\\Roaming\\Notepad++\\updater\\GUP.exe")))))
